The fix is in place. Here's what I found and changed:

**Root cause:** The shared `sitenav.js` (loaded from `clung.us/sitenav.js`) injects a fixed-position navigation bar and then adds `padding-top` to the `<body>` equal to the nav's height, so page content isn't hidden beneath it. The terminal page at `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py` overrides `.sitenav { position: relative }` so the nav participates in the flex column layout instead of floating.
